title: Clean up assertions in #823 and #840
body:
Modifications to address assertions in #823 and #840.  I had previously opened a pull request based just off #840, but haven't figured everything out to allow me to create a separate pull request for #823. so I closed the original pull request. Be Kind to newbs, please :-)

Here's the new error message #823, together with the original assertion:
```
wlye@AMR-BU-L02782:~/issues/issue-823$ cat test1.sv
module test2;
  struct packed {logic a;} s;
  assign s.a = 1;
  assign s.c = 1;
endmodule
wlye@AMR-BU-L02782:~/issues/issue-823$ cat test2.sv
module test2;
  struct packed {struct packed {logic a;} t;} u;
  assign u.t.a = 1;
  assign u.t.c = 1;
endmodule
wlye@AMR-BU-L02782:~/issues/issue-823$ iverilog-x -g2012 test1.sv
test1.sv:4: error: missing element s.c
1 error(s) during elaboration.
wlye@AMR-BU-L02782:~/issues/issue-823$ iverilog-x -g2012 test2.sv
test2.sv:4: error: missing element u.t.c
1 error(s) during elaboration.
wlye@AMR-BU-L02782:~/issues/issue-823$ iverilog -g2012 test1.sv
test1.sv:4: assert: elab_net.cc:640: failed assertion member
Aborted
wlye@AMR-BU-L02782:~/issues/issue-823$ iverilog -g2012 test2.sv
test2.sv:4: assert: elab_net.cc:640: failed assertion member
Aborted
wlye@AMR-BU-L02782:~/issues/issue-823$
```

Here are the new compile-time error messages for #840, together with the original assertions:
```
wlye@AMR-BU-L02782:~/issues/issue-840$ cat test1.sv
module test1;
  logic [1:0][1:0] a;
  logic [1:0][1:0] b;
  generate
    for(genvar i=0;i<3;i++)
      assign b[i] = a[i];
  endgenerate
endmodule
wlye@AMR-BU-L02782:~/issues/issue-840$ cat test2.sv
module test2;
  logic [1:0][1:0] a;
  logic [2:0][1:0] b;
  generate
    for(genvar i=0;i<3;i++)
      assign b[i] = a[i];
  endgenerate
endmodule
wlye@AMR-BU-L02782:~/issues/issue-840$ iverilog-x -g2012 test1.sv
test1.sv:6: error: Index b[2] is out of range.
test1.sv:6: error: Unresolved net/uwire b cannot have multiple drivers.
2 error(s) during elaboration.
wlye@AMR-BU-L02782:~/issues/issue-840$ iverilog-x -g2012 test2.sv
test2.sv:6: error: Index a[2] is out of range.
test2.sv:6: error: Unable to elaborate r-value: a[i]
2 error(s) during elaboration.
wlye@AMR-BU-L02782:~/issues/issue-840$ iverilog -g2012 test1.sv
test1.sv:6: assert: elab_net.cc:467: failed assertion rcl
Aborted
wlye@AMR-BU-L02782:~/issues/issue-840$ iverilog -g2012 test2.sv
test2.sv:6: assert: elab_expr.cc:6229: failed assertion rc
Aborted
wlye@AMR-BU-L02782:~/issues/issue-840$
```
